targets.queryText:
SELECT Team, Country, State, City, Name, School, RookieYear, PostalCode, Website
FROM teams
WHERE Team = '2641'
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT Team, Country, State, City, Name, School, RookieYear, PostalCode, Website
FROM teams
WHERE Team = '$Team'

targets.queryText:
SELECT Team, State
FROM teams
WHERE Team = '2641'
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT Team, State
FROM teams
WHERE Team = '$Team'
